title: Herramientas de Texto
tabDesc: Cuente caracteres, palabras, oraciones, párrafos y líneas en su texto.
caseDesc: Convierta texto a mayúsculas, minúsculas, título o alternar mayúsculas.
base64Desc: Codifique texto a Base64 o decodifique Base64 a texto.
seoDescription: Count words, characters, sentences, paragraphs, and lines in any text. Get real-time statistics including reading time and speaking time. This free word counter and text analyzer for writers, students, and content creators.
